title: Robo Testing Comprehensive Quiz
description: A comprehensive test suite for automated robo testing, covering all features and question types.

questions.question: Which programming language is used to write Flutter apps?
questions.subject: Flutter Basics
questions.description: Flutter uses the Dart programming language developed by Google.

questions.question: What is the command to create a new Flutter project?
questions.subject: Flutter Basics
questions.description: The 'flutter create' command initializes a new project directory.

questions.question: Which of these are Flutter layout widgets?
questions.subject: Flutter Basics
questions.description: Column, Row, and Stack are fundamental layout widgets. Service is not a widget.

questions.question: What is the default port for Firebase Hosting local emulator?
questions.subject: Firebase
questions.description: Firebase Hosting emulator typically runs on port 5000 by default.

questions.question: Which Firebase services are used for authentication?
questions.subject: Firebase
questions.description: Firebase Auth handles the core logic, while Google Sign-In is a supported provider.

questions.question: Cloud Firestore is what type of database?
questions.subject: Firebase
questions.description: Firestore is a flexible, scalable NoSQL cloud database.

questions.question: What is 12 x 12?
questions.subject: Logic

questions.question: If a train travels 60 miles in 1 hour, how many miles does it travel in 2.5 hours?
questions.subject: Logic

questions.question: Which of these are Dart collection types?
questions.subject: Flutter Basics
questions.description: Dart has List, Set, and Map. Dictionary is the name in other languages like Python.

questions.question: Does Firestore support offline data persistence?
questions.subject: Firebase
questions.description: Firestore can cache data locally for offline access.

questions.question: What is the result of 2 + 2 * 2?
questions.subject: Logic

questions.question: Which widget is used for repeated items in a scrollable list?
questions.subject: Flutter Basics
questions.description: ListView and GridView are commonly used for scrollable lists/grids of items.

questions.question: How many bits are in a byte?
questions.subject: Logic

questions.question: Is 'StatelessWidget' immutable?
questions.subject: Flutter Basics
questions.description: Stateless widgets are immutable, meaning their properties cannot change.

questions.question: What is the primary key in Firestore called?
questions.subject: Firebase
questions.description: Each document in a collection is uniquely identified by its Document ID.

questions.question: Select the even numbers:
questions.subject: Logic

questions.question: What is the square root of 81?
questions.subject: Logic

questions.question: Which command is used to add a dependency to pubspec.yaml?
questions.subject: Flutter Basics
questions.description: 'flutter pub add' automates adding packages to your project.

questions.question: Can Firebase Cloud Functions be written in Python?
questions.subject: Firebase
questions.description: Firebase Cloud Functions support Node.js, Python, and Go.

questions.question: Sum of first 5 natural numbers?
questions.subject: Logic
